title: boehmeria helferi
intro: Boehmeria helferi, also known as the Indian nettle or Helfer's nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria helferi include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Boehmeria helferi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although its availability and usage may vary depending on the region.
